artifact.name: nlp-policy-nz-benchmark-model
public_contracts: token F1 and classification PRF metrics

requirements.description: Model card documents provenance, training data, intended use, limitations, and evaluation results.
Fine-tuned adapter weights and tokenizer config are ready for upload.
Benchmark suite runs successfully with published results for reproducibility.
Creators, title, description, license, related identifiers, and files are ready for DOI archival.

security_gates.name: No private or gated training data leakage
Rights and provenance review of training corpus

phases.name: Model registry inventory
tasks: Map Hugging Face and Zenodo requirements.
Record training data provenance and redistribution constraints.

phases.name: Publication
tasks: Publish adapter weights, benchmark results, and model card only after review approval.

submission_workflow.commit_policy: Commit manifest and evidence in the nlp-policy-nz repo only.
submission_workflow.review_policy: Review training data provenance, evaluation results, model card, and registry metadata before publication.
submission_workflow.actions_policy: Check nlp-policy-nz training, benchmark, and publication workflows before and after approved upload.
